---
title: Imogen Corvalen
type: person
aliases: [imogen]
summary: Founder of Emberweave Systems.
---

Imogen Corvalen is the founder of Emberweave Systems. Imogen flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

---
title: Elspeth Farrowdale
type: person
aliases: [elspeth]
summary: Founder of Quillstream Labs.
---

Elspeth Farrowdale is the founder of Quillstream Labs. Elspeth shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

---
title: Emberweave Systems
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Imogen Corvalen.
---

Emberweave Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Imogen Corvalen. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Pinecrest Hollow Capital
type: org
summary: Early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.
---

Pinecrest Hollow Capital is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Imogen Corvalen and Elspeth Farrowdale both want Pinecrest Hollow Capital in the Emberweave Systems round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
